title: チヨノオーは頼られたい！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm-hm-hmmm! ♪
choice_data_list:
Someone's in a good mood. Did something
happen?

Someone's in a good mood. Did something
happen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Well, Biko and Akebono asked me for a
favor!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe the day has finally come for
younger students to start relying on me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be like Maruzen! I'm going to stay
cool as a cucumber no matter what they ask me
and give them advice like it's no big deal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's the kind of cool cat attitude I've gotta
sport!
Chiyono O! Sorry to keep you waiting. ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Is your trainer coming too? That's good. It'll
be more fun with more people!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever they're talking about doesn't seem
quite in line with what Sakura Chiyono O was
telling me, but I end up tagging along anyway.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-an amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We always thought it would be fun to come
here with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This was the favor they wanted to ask me? O... okay, but that doesn't change that they asked me for something!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Right?! Yeah, I'm sure of it! All right, then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Leave things to me! I'll make this the best
amusement park trip you've ever been on!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The Carrot Ranger show was awesome! Wasn't
that last Carrot Punch she threw just the coolest?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You liked it that much, huh... Okay, then how
about this? They're letting attendees take
pictures with her over there, so why don't we ask
for one too?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, say chee—ah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger, the angle of your punch is lower
than it was in the show!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's one of Biko's favorite poses, so would you
mind adjusting it? I want to get this picture just
right! Oh, and keep looking over here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(All right! I'm talking like a real camera operator!
I'm sure this will be a good memory for Biko!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wait! Biko, don't put your arm down!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Uh, there's a line forming behind us, so let's get
out of the way. As an ally of justice, knowing
when to step back is important! Isn't that right,
Carrot Ranger?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh! You're right! Sorry for making such a fuss!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll get it right for sure next time! You like food
and cooking, right, Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I looked up some information earlier, and
this amusement park is apparently famous for its
gargantuan omelet! Let's check it out!

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but our gargantuan omelets must be
reserved at least a day in advance...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine with just a regular omelet. ♪ Eating with
your friends makes everything taste better!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Uuurgh! I messed up again!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's attempts at helping her
juniors enjoy themselves continue to be thwarted,
one by one...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today, Chiyono O! I had a lot of
fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Let's hang out again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... See you later!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I was an utter failure today...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show off how reliable I am, but all I
did was make a fool out of myself... If anything,
they were the ones taking care of me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They were the ones who asked me for a favor,
too, and I still messed up...
choice_data_list: I think they both had fun.
Not everything goes well the first time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's true... But they probably would've had fun
even without me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh! Stop! I can't keep being so negative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing to do in times like these
is to work hard! Right now, I'm what people call a
carrot in the rough!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They sure do! And that means that if I keep
polishing myself without giving up, someday this
carrot will shine just as bright as a diamond!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to shine like a carrot! Just you wait and
see, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not sold on that dubious idiom, but I'm
curious to see just how hard she plans on working.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're right! It is unlikely for things to go well the first time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
As long as they keep relying on me, I'm sure I'll
become reliable someday!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm all fired up now! Just you wait! I'm going
to be the most trustworthy person everrrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see just how hard she plans on
working.
